inputs.question: 固态电池 2026 年商业化进展

evidence_cards.claim: 固态电池技术正在2026年进入实际生产阶段
evidence_cards.source_title: Solid-State Batteries 2026: How the Technology Is Finally Reaching Commercial Use
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: solid-state battery technology is entering real-world production in 2026

evidence_cards.claim: 高制造成本和规模化生产复杂性是固态电池商业化的主要障碍
evidence_cards.source_title: Solid-state Battery Market Size & Share Report, 2026-2033
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Despite strong interest, high production costs and manufacturing complexity remain major restraints. Solid-state cells require new materials (such as sulfide or oxide electrolytes) and specialized processing steps, often at elevated temperatures or in dry environments, which differ from today's gigafactory lines built around liquid-electrolyte lithium-ion. This raises capital expenditure and slows down scale-up...

evidence_cards.claim: 亚太地区（中国、日本、韩国）是固态电池研发和制造的中心
evidence_cards.source_title: Solid-state Battery Market Size & Share Report, 2026-2033
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Asia Pacific is emerging as the largest manufacturing and deployment hub for advanced batteries, including solid-state technologies, led by China, Japan, and South Korea

evidence_cards.claim: 电动汽车需求的增长是驱动固态电池市场扩张的关键因素
evidence_cards.source_title: Solid State Battery Market Report 2026 - Research and Markets
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: The upward trajectory of electric vehicle (EV) adoption is poised to be a catalyst for the expansion of the solid-state battery market.

evidence_cards.claim: 固态电池的能量密度目标是400-500 Wh/kg，远高于当前锂离子电池的200-300 Wh/kg
evidence_cards.source_title: Solid-State Batteries 2026: How the Technology Is Finally Reaching Commercial Use
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Today's best lithium-ion batteries deliver 200–300 Wh/kg. Solid-state batteries 2026 are targeting 400–500 Wh/kg commercially, with potential to reach 500–600 Wh/kg in the coming years.

evidence_cards.claim: 固态电池具有更好的安全性，不易燃，热稳定性更高
evidence_cards.source_title: Solid-state Battery Market Size & Share Report, 2026-2033
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: Solid-state architectures replace flammable liquid electrolytes with solid ones, significantly lowering fire risk

evidence_cards.claim: 中国将在2026年7月发布首个固态电池标准
evidence_cards.source_title: Solid-State Batteries 2026: How the Technology Is Finally Reaching Commercial Use
evidence_cards.supporting_snippet: China set to release its first solid-state battery standard in July 2026
